transcript.text:
Excuse me, excuse me, excuse me
(One more of these, please!)
(The chef here is busy...)
(because of one customer, Tzuyang!)
I'm so sorry, but...
(One more of these Round 2)
Excuse me
(One more of these Round 3) Can I order more dim sum?
(Is it for real?)
(She can't, there's no steamer left)
No steamer?
Hello, everyone
I'm at Yeonnam-dong
If you go into an alley off of Gyeongui Line Forest Park
there's a must-eat place
(Today's target is Yeonnam-dong)

(where is filled with joy and must-eat places) I heard that the chef worked in China
('Diilong' specialized in dim sum) for 20 years as a chef
and he came to Korea to open a restaurant
(Raving reviews) Everyone says it's 'the best dim sum ever' in reviews
It's that good
This place is so small
that they installed the kiosk outside!
I want to eat it while it's still hot
I'm going to order small portions each!
(2 servings for 3 types of dim sum each!) (Pork xiaolongbao, shrimp xiaolongbao / shumai)
(Who ordered all these...?)
Ah, are you Tzuyang?
- Hello - Hello
(Tzuyang can order this much) You're slender, by the way
Did you work as a chef in China?
Yes, about 20 years

I can finally taste the original dim sum, then
You'll see!
Excited
(The flavor he perfected in China)
(It's better 'cause it's freshly cooked as an order comes in)
(While waiting for the food) There's pickled mustard stem
(she eats the pickled mustard steam first)
It's great!
Even the pickle is the real deal
(The game hasn't begun yet)
(The real dim sum enters!) Thank you
It looks so good!
Put it on the spoon
There are instructions
You put one on a spoon
and slightly rip the skin and drain the juice

Look at the juice!
It's pouring out
(Slurp)
It's so flavorful!
Dip it lightly in soy sauce
It's so good...
The skin is chewy
The filling melts in your mouth
There's so much juice inside!
Shrimp! I'll have shrimp xiaolongbao, soup dumpling
I think I can just dip it and eat it
(Even the shrimp one is juicy) Delicious!
(It is burst with the juice running)
Give me my juice back...
(Drink what's left of the juice first)
Ahhh, it's good...

(Savoring)
It's good even without soy sauce
(Shumai is done, too)
Thank you, it's shumai!
Shumai looks so good, too
(Having a bite right away) A hot one right out of the steamer
I'm loving it, eating it so hot
(5 years of mukbang has taught her a lot) This is legit, even at first glance!
Look at the skin
Lots of places make it so thick, but this is very thin
(It's different, very different)
This is what you call shumai
The texture is great
I'll show you the juice inside
The juice is very meaty
Good

So good
Twenty-eight
(May sound like Korean cursing, but counting)
It's so moist!
Where is my dim sum? Is it all gone?
(Look here)
Excuse me
If it's alright
can I order 2 servings of these again?
Thank you
(She sensed it) I had a feeling this won't stay long
So I ordered it in advance
The shrimp feeling is so moist
even juicy
I'll eat it without draining the juice
Will I get mouth burns?

Have a whole xiaolongbao with the juice inside
It has its own flavor, too
It bursts in your mouth
It's really...
It makes you happy
(Nodding)
(She slayed the whole thing like she said...) There's only one left in each steamer
(She wants more even when she's eating it)
I didn't even start and they're gone
(Pile up the steamers!) Let's pile them this way
It's pork xiaolongbao
Got it! Thank you
Thank you
It looks yum!
Meat dumpling first while it's hot
(The whole set complete with shumai)

Wow, it's so juicy
(Drinking the hot juice)
It's warm, so warm
It tastes better when it's steaming hot
H... Hot
It's insane!
Whoa, it's so delicious
(Let's eat shumai fresh off the heat!)
(The hotter, the tastier)
(The last xiaolongbao arrived)
(It's enormous...)
(It's too soon to be surprised yet!) I should put an order right now!
Excuse me, I'm so sorry
(Another order before she eats the food) but can you make the entire set again?
- All three? - Yes
I'm sorry

(He can't stop making dim sum)
I ordered it little by little, 'cause it cools down
if you order everything all at once, but I feel bad for him
(The filling and juice wrapped in thin skin) Here, you can enjoy it
(plus the chef's devotion to it) with thin skin
(That's why it's the best dim sum) and plenty of juice
Shrimp!
(Bring out the hidden dim sum!)
It'll be so fun if there's no steamer left
(It is a prophecy)
(Forgot about the cross-section shot) Let me show you the inside
I forgot to show you this
There's ground shrimp meat
Look at the inside of shrimp one, too
(It looks impeccable)
I like to burst it first then eat it

But having the whole thing that's cooled down a bit
It's delightful
like when you bite down juicy meat
(She's delighted)
Pop
(These are for her)
(And this is what's left)
(Her joy won't last long)
I wouldn't have been able to eat this much
if I came here when it's crowded, no steamer left
(This tower is possible only when it's not busy) I finished it!
Thank you
Steaming hot ones are the best
(Bear it for the tastiness...) Hot
Thank you
Hot!

How can it be so juicy?
(Round 3 is set) Put it up there!
Excuse me
Can I order more dim sum?
(It's not over until it's over)
I have 2 steamers left
Only 2 left?
I'll have one serving of shumai
and one pork xiaolongbao, then
Thank you
I'll eat the fresh ones before it gets cooled down
(She doesn't get sick of it)
Next!
There are 2 steamers left
It's like my trophy
I'm not fully full, let's have beef noodles

Excuse me
Give me one bowl of beef noodles, too!
Okay
Thank you!
(Trophy / Trophy)
(It's disappearing too fast)
I ate 20 steamers of dim sum
(20 including the last 2!)
Oh, thank you
(Finishing up the dim sum first)
(and clear the steamers away)
You have to eat it right away while it's hot
(Never get bored of the juice)
It's pleasantly hot
I want a whole bowl of this juice
(A true meat lover)

(The last dim sum)
That is the 20th, right?
The record was 10 servings until now...
(It's beyond his imagination)
(The juice is insanely good) It's crazy, look!
So good!
I don't need to burst it, do I?
Perfect, nice
Beef noodles! Thank you
(Today's dessert is beef noodles) Yummy
Look at the color
(You can feel the tastiness from the color) This is what I want to see in beef noodles
The soup, first!
Wow, it's absolutely legit
I've never had it in China
but I feel the originality

The soup is very flavorful
Noodles
The beef looks so tender
(She's IMPRESSED)
The noodles are
somewhat
firm and cheeeewy(?)
It's more like
you can cut it easily with your teeth
but...
you keep chewing, and it becomes chewier
(She finished the noodles already)
I ate them all
The precious last dim sum!
(20-story tower complete)
This place is a gem

hidden in an alley, run by a hidden master
He make 6 dishes only
It's not flashy
but more like...
simple and tasty
(It's awesome, no doubt about it) And it's so juicy
that I enjoyed it a lot
I had a great meal as usual!
Sir, it was wonderful, so good
Oh
I hope you're okay
She made ME worry
